title: coeloglossum islandicum
intro: Coeloglossum islandicum, also known as the island lady's slipper orchid, is a perennial orchid species that is native to the island of Newfoundland in Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coeloglossum islandicum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
